message:
fix(dashboard): propagate ProjectKey through mail inbox summary, init summary maps

Thread the ProjectKey from the mail-inbox fetch through
AgentMailInboxSummaryMsg so that PublishMailPending/PublishMailAckRequired
receive the project context needed by the new robot-mail-check action.

Also initialise AgentsByState and AgentsByType maps in GetDashboard to
prevent nil-map panics when no agents are running, and default unknown
agent types to "unknown" for consistent accounting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
